data.name: Hentai Neighbors
data.detailed_description:
As Hiroki, a 18 year old boy, who went visiting the village of his grandmother on summer vacation. Here, he met many girls and had sweet memories with them - which he would never forget... Let's flip the tile and find the matched ones to fully unlock memories of Hiroki about these girls.

Game Features
- Beautiful artwork
- Interesting story
- Cute and sexy japanese voice
- 100 achievements
- Relaxing and romantic music

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7
  • 處理器: Intel Core 2 Dual or AMD Equivalent
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Intel HD Graphics
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 400 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7
  • 處理器: Intel Core 2 Dual or AMD Equivalent
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Intel HD Graphics
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
